verdicts.note: The dossier contains no stated public-safety posture (nothing on policing, encampments, prosecution, or diversion). The +1 is inferred from her behavioral-health career and 988/crisis-line work, which is her healthcare portfolio, not a safety position; her pamphlet also cites enforcement-adjacent work (child sexual exploitation protections, protecting survivors of gun violence) that cuts the other way. Indirect inference = low confidence per the guide.

Direction and confidence are well supported by an enacted record (AI insurance-denial ban, deepfake law), but +2 means fully at the regulate-aggressively pole, which per the rubric includes data-center limits and platform accountability. Her documented record is narrower consumer-protection AI guardrails only; nothing in the dossier supports the maximal position.
